title: Quran production source selection gate
gateRequirements: Real Quran source URL or source file path recorded
Candidate approvalStatus set to production-approved only after manual review
Quran importer output passes count, key and route validation
decisionReasons: Current Quran candidate is still a placeholder record.
License is not approved for redistribution.
Reviewer sign-off has not been recorded.
nextAction: Replace the placeholder candidate with a real Quran source candidate, complete license/attribution/checksum/reviewer evidence, then rerun pnpm quran:gate.
